channel.title: Publications on Bokyung | Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Bokyung | Personal Website

item.title: PoseMate: A Conceptual Framework for AI-Generated Socially Driven Pose Guidance for Gen Z Photo-Taking
item.description: PoseMate is a conceptual AI photo-taking assistant that generates socially driven pose guidance for Gen Z by treating pose trends from social media as designable knowledge.

item.title: DanXeReflect: Interacting with the Spatio-Temporal Past Movements for Embodied, Reflective Choreographic Collaboration
item.description: DanXeReflect is an XR system that transforms rehearsal video into an interactive 3D studio where past movements appear as avatars for collaborative reflection.

item.title: TwistLens: A Docent-Informed Image Transformation to Create Previews That Prompt Anticipation and Interpretive Experiences Before Museum Visits
item.description: TwistLens is a docent-informed, AI-supported image transformation system that creates spoiler-minimizing previews for pre-visit museum experiences.

item.title: Exploring Learner Experiences with the Korean Voice AI Tutor for Korean Language Learning
item.description: This paper investigates how non-Korean learners experience a Korean voice-based AI tutor during speaking practice.

item.title: FrottarX: A Visual Logging System for Immersive Reflection on Personal Visual Logs through Bodily Re-enactment
item.description: FrottarX presents a bodily re-enactment based visual logging approach that helps users reflect on personal museum visit records in a more immersive way.

item.title: Exploring Gen Z’s Photo-taking Behaviors to Inform Novel Uses of AI for Photo-taking Assistants
item.description: This paper examines how Gen Z users take photos in trend-driven social contexts and identifies opportunities for AI photo-taking assistants.

item.title: ParaScent: Motion-Enhanced Parametric Visualization Toolkit to Communicate Perfume Attributes in Digital Contexts
item.description: ParaScent explores a motion-enhanced parametric visualization toolkit designed to communicate perfume attributes in digital environments.

item.title: PONIFY: Pose-driven Painting Sonification to Enhance Augmented Artwork Perception through Sense of Dynamics
item.description: Integrating auditory elements that complement the visual features of the paintings can enhance artwork appreciation.

item.title: Designatomy: Technology-Driven Rapid Ideation Pedagogy for Tech-Novice Design Students
item.description: The rapid technological and cultural advancements of the Fourth Industrial Revolution require designers to develop two essential skills: (i) the ability to quickly adapt to emerging technology and (ii) the ability to generate creative ideas in both user-driven and technology-driven ways.

item.title: User-Centered Investigation of Generative AI and XR Interactions in 3D Product Design Tools
item.description: Advanced technologies empower novices to create 3D products independently, yet existing tools focus on simplifying object creation, overlooking support for reflecting on users’ needs and desires.

item.title: Exploring the Next Phase of Situated and Interactive Docents for XR Exhibitions: From the Perspective of Knowledge Delivery
item.description: Working from home (WFH) provides flexibility but often at the expense of productivity.

item.title: A Preliminary Study on Visual Guidance in Pose Replication
item.description: This preliminary study explores how different visual guidance designs affect users’ ability to replicate poses in photo-taking scenarios.

item.title: Discovery of Themes for Museum Docent Narratives to Guide XR Interactions for Better Comprehension
item.description: This paper analyzes museum docent narratives to derive thematic frameworks that can guide XR interaction design for improved visitor comprehension.

item.title: Investigating Work Companion Robot Interactions to Enhance Work-from-Home Productivity and Experience
item.description: Working from home (WFH) provides flexibility but often at the expense of productivity.

item.title: Participatory Exploration on How to Enhance Art Appreciation in Virtual Museums
item.description: This work investigates how virtual museum interactions can better support art appreciation through participatory methods.

item.title: Everyday Objects in VR Shape Exploration Tools for Novice Artists - A way to Support Geometry Shaping Process for Non-professionals
item.description: Background. Advanced technologies like Virtual Reality (VR) or Augmented Reality (AR) opened up new possibilities for non-professionals to create 3D shapes, forms, or artworks without professional training.

item.title: Generative Design for COVID-19 and Future Pathogens Using Stochastic Multi-agent Simulation
item.description: We propose a generative design workflow that integrates a stochastic multi-agent simulation with the intent of helping building designers reduce the risk posed by COVID-19 and future pathogens.

item.title: Understanding the Roles of Intelligent Product-Customization Systems through Expert Interviews
item.description: The COVID-19 pandemic changed our lives, forcing us to reconsider our built environment, architectural designs, and even behaviours.

item.title: Simulation and Visualization of Virus Transmission for Architectural Design Analysis
Designing a Multi-Agent Occupant Simulation System to Support Facility Planning and Analysis for COVID-19
item.description: The COVID-19 pandemic changed our lives, forcing us to reconsider our built environment, architectural designs, and even behaviours.

item.title: Evaluating Color and Material of Home Appliances in Virtual Homes during the Early Stage of Design
PoseScape: Pose-based Analysis System for Long-term Observation Studies
Socio-Spatial Comfort: Using Vision-based Analysis to Inform User-Centred Human-Building Interactions
Embodied Design Toolkits for Consumers and Creators
An Empirical Study of How Socio-Spatial Formations are influenced by Interior Elements and Displays in an Office Context
Skeletonographer: Skeleton-based Digital Ethnography Tool
Occupancy Visualization towards Activity Recognition
Semantic Human Activity Annotation Tool Using Skeletonized Surveillance Videos
SmartManikin: Virtual Humans with Agency for Design Tools
The Effect of Interruption Timings on Autonomous Height-Adjustable Desks that Responds to Task Changes.
Interactive and Situated Guidelines to Help Users Design a Personal Desk that Fits Their Bodies
Consumer to Creator: How Households Buy Furniture to Inform Design and Fabrication Interfaces.
Ori-mandu: Korean Dumpling into Whatever Shape You Want
Ori-mandu: Korean Dumpling into Whatever Shape You Want
Two Mental Models of Non-Professional Design Process for Future Fabrication Interface.
Posing and Acting as Input for Personalizing Furniture
Collaboration in the Living Room or How Couples Design Together
Gesture-based Trafficator to Improve Driver to Traffic Communication.
Sketching in Virtual Reality for Rapid and Situated Idea Generation.
TagRadar: Locating Objects Using a Smart Phone Accessory
Online User Reviews as a Design Resource.
